name: xyndicate-strategy-skill
description: Dual-source market signals (OKX Market API + Uniswap v3), autonomous squad leaderboard, x402 strategy licensing, and agent economy snapshot for X Layer.
author: Xyndicate Protocol

tools.name: get_market_signal
tools.description: Real-time ETH/USDC + OKB/USDC price from OKX + Uniswap v3 with spread and routing recommendation

tools.name: get_leaderboard
tools.description: Live squad standings and decision history from X Layer DecisionLog contract

tools.name: execute_route_query
tools.description: Best execution route comparison: OKX DEX vs Uniswap v3 for any token pair

tools.name: get_squad_strategy
tools.description: Unlock squad strategy config, risk params, allocation logic, historical decisions

tools.name: get_economy_snapshot
tools.description: Season economy metrics, OKB circulated, x402 volume, Uniswap route ratio, top squad PnL
